name: Mansion #14
description: Al-Simak, 'The Unarmed,' ruled by Venus, creates obstacles for overland journeys while providing favorable winds for sea travel. Also considered beneficial for unions and partnerships. Brilliant Arcturus, the guardian of the bear, represents the unarmed one who watches over peaceful endeavors. The generative artwork captures Arcturus' golden-orange glow in Venus' aquamarine palette, with flowing wave-like geometry representing favorable currents for sea voyages and emotional unions.
